steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: The sentence has a parenthetical insertion: "the explosion of a massive star, which blasts large amounts... into space." That insertion is closed with an em dash before "that was first detected by...". For matching punctuation, it should open with an em dash too.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
A comma (A), period (B), or colon (D) doesn't pair with the trailing em dash to bracket the insertion. Only an em dash matches the closing dash, forming a parenthetical pair.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
